import { step } from "@blokjs/core";
import { chainTest as chainTestCsharp } from "../../nodes-gen/runtime.csharp";
import { chainTest } from "../../nodes-gen/runtime.go";
import { chainTest as chainTestJava } from "../../nodes-gen/runtime.java";
import { chainTest as chainTestPython3 } from "../../nodes-gen/runtime.python3";
import { chainTest as chainTestRust } from "../../nodes-gen/runtime.rust";


export function build() {
	step("go", chainTest, {}, { type: "runtime.go" });
	step("rust", chainTestRust, {}, { type: "runtime.rust" });
	step("java", chainTestJava, {}, { type: "runtime.java" });
	step("csharp", chainTestCsharp, {}, { type: "runtime.csharp" });
	step("python", chainTestPython3, {}, { type: "runtime.python3" });
}
